case_title: RAY SHIH VS. APRICUS CONSTRUCTION INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) E. CLIFFORD HAYOSHI AND JOSE AJVIX FILED BY DEFENDANT APRICUS CONSTRUCTION INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PLAINTIFF RAY SHIH AND DEFENDANT APRICUS CONTRUCTION INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHIH, RAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APRICUS CONSTRUCTION INC. $10,253.37 PRINCIPAL, $210.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,463.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT APRICUS CONSTRUCTION INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $135. SERVED OCT-25-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT APRICUS CONSTRUCTION INC.
